name: codex-buddy-reviewer
description: One or two turn-window-grounded reviewers with animated companions, attributed results, diagnostics, and reversible setup.

interface.shortDescription: Automatic independent review after Codex work
interface.longDescription: Capture private start and finish snapshots for enabled Codex turns, run one or two isolated configured reviewers concurrently, preserve provider attribution and partial failures, leave the worker summary in the Codex transcript, and deliver grounded technical review plus optional primary-only separately consented summary advice through one safe Stop continuation.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-buddy-reviewer:buddy-review to toggle automatic review for this workspace.
Use $codex-buddy-reviewer:review to run a one-shot review of my current changes.
